steps.t: Tholmuzog can be found north-west of Búshatap in Máttugard. You should locate Tholmuzog.
Tholmuzog can be found north-west of Búshatap in Máttugard. You should defeat Orcs and trolls at Tholmuzog and discover what they plan to do in Máttug…
Hetbrúda can be found near Tholmuzog. You should bring the Orc-orders to Hetbrúda.
